summary: CARE ADVANTAGE is a comprehensive health insurance policy offering coverage up to 6 Cr with automatic recharge facility and global coverage options. It provides hospitalization benefits for claims made in India and out of India with various sum insured options ranging from 25L to 600L.
coverage: In Patient & Day Care Hospitalization Expenses up to Sum Insured
Room Rent - Most Economical Single PVT AC Room with option to modify to All Category
Road Ambulance Cover up to Sum Insured
Organ Donor Expenses up to Sum Insured
Automatic Recharge up to Sum Insured once in a Policy Year
Global Coverage with Worldwide or Worldwide excluding USA & CANADA options
Air Ambulance coverage for out of India claims
Repatriation of Mortal Remains up to 5 Lakh for out of India coverage
Compassionate visit up to Sum Insured with minimum 5 days hospitalization
waiting_periods: Initial Wait Period: 30 Days except for treatment of injuries
room_rent: Most Economical Single PVT AC Room
Option to Modify to All Category
Out of India coverage - No Limit for room rent/ICU
co_pay: 20% Co-payment applicable on all claims if Co-payment option is selected
Additional 20% co-payment applicable if treatment taken outside Smart Select Network when Smart Select is opted
Co-payment applicable on treatment outside India if opted
claims_information: Claims will have impact on No Claim Bonus
Automatic Recharge available once in a Policy Year for related and unrelated illness
Health Services Discount Connect available for discounts on consultations, diagnostics at network
Favourable Claim Experience Based Discount applicable on policies renewed till age 59 years
Premium increases by 10% on every renewal for customers with age >=60 years
exclusions: Global coverage not offered to NRI/OCI/PIO/Person Staying out of India >182 Days/Foreign National/Person Working Abroad/Merchant Navy/Students registered with Foreign Universities or colleges
No Claim Bonus not applicable for out of India coverage
Automatic Recharge not applicable for out of India coverage
Organ Donor Cover not applicable for lower sum insured out of India coverage
Air Ambulance not applicable for lower sum insured out of India coverage

faqs.question: What is the maximum sum insured available under CARE ADVANTAGE?
faqs.answer: The sum insured options available are 25L/50L/100L/200L/300L/600L.

faqs.question: What is the minimum and maximum entry age for this policy?
faqs.answer: Minimum entry age for Individual is 5 years and for Floater is 91 days with at least 1 person of 18 years or above. Maximum entry age for Child is 24 years and for Adult there is no age limit.

faqs.question: What is the policy term available?
faqs.answer: Policy term available is 1/2/3 years.

faqs.question: What is the initial waiting period?
faqs.answer: Initial waiting period is 30 days except for treatment of injuries.

faqs.question: What is the waiting period for pre-existing diseases?
faqs.answer: Pre-existing disease wait period is 36 months.

faqs.question: What is the waiting period for named ailments?
faqs.answer: Named ailment wait period is 24 months.

faqs.question: What room rent coverage is provided?
faqs.answer: Most Economical Single PVT AC Room is covered with option to modify to All Category.

faqs.question: Are ICU charges covered and is there any limit?
faqs.answer: ICU charges are covered with no limit.

faqs.question: What is the pre-hospitalization expense coverage period?
faqs.answer: Pre-hospitalization expenses are covered for 30 days.

faqs.question: What is the post-hospitalization expense coverage period?
faqs.answer: Post-hospitalization expenses are covered for 60 days.

faqs.question: Is ambulance cover provided?
faqs.answer: Yes, road ambulance cover is provided up to sum insured.

faqs.question: What is No Claim Bonus and how does it work?
faqs.answer: No Claim Bonus provides 10% increase in sum insured per policy year in case of claim-free year with maximum increase up to 50% of sum insured. Claims will have impact on No Claim Bonus.

faqs.question: What is Automatic Recharge benefit?
faqs.answer: Automatic Recharge provides coverage up to sum insured once in a policy year for related and unrelated illness.

faqs.question: Is global coverage available?
faqs.answer: Yes, global coverage is available with option to choose Worldwide or Worldwide excluding USA & CANADA coverage.

faqs.question: Who is not eligible for global coverage?
faqs.answer: Global coverage is not offered to NRI/OCI/PIO/Person staying out of India >182 days/Foreign National/Person working abroad/Merchant Navy/Students registered with foreign universities or colleges.

faqs.question: What are the premium zones?
faqs.answer: Zone 1: Delhi NCR, Surat, Mathura, Aligarh; Zone 2: Mumbai (MMR), Telangana, Indore, Nashik; Zone 3: Pune, Bangalore Urban, Rest of Gujarat; Zone 4: Rest of India.

faqs.question: What is the Favourable Claim Experience Based Discount?
faqs.answer: It is a discount based on lifetime score calculation applicable on policies renewed till age 59 years, with discounts ranging from 2.5% to 40% based on claim history.

faqs.question: How does premium change for senior citizens above 60 years?
faqs.answer: Premium will increase by 10% on every renewal for customers with age >=60 years. Favourable claim experience discount is not applicable on renewal on or after 60 years.

faqs.question: What is NCB Super optional benefit?
faqs.answer: NCB Super provides 50% of sum insured increase for every claim-free year with maximum increase limited to 100% of sum insured.

faqs.question: What is Annual Health Check-up benefit?
faqs.answer: One health check for each insured in a policy year available at network labs with prior appointments through mobile application covering pre-defined set of tests based on policy sum insured and age.

faqs.question: What is Claim Shield Plus?
faqs.answer: Claim Shield Plus covers expenses incurred on non-payable items as per List 1, List 2, List 3, List 4 in Annexure 1 in policy terms and conditions.

faqs.question: What is Air Ambulance coverage?
faqs.answer: Air Ambulance covers expenses up to 5L incurred on emergency transportation of insured from one hospital to another on written advice of treating doctor.

faqs.question: What is Smart Select benefit?
faqs.answer: Smart Select provides 15% discount on premium if customer agrees to take treatment in special network only. 20% co-payment applies on claims made outside the smart select network.

faqs.question: Can Pre-existing Disease wait period be reduced?
faqs.answer: Yes, PED wait period can be modified from 3 years to 2 years but can only be added at the time of first purchase of CARE ADVANTAGE policy, not at renewal or migration.

faqs.question: What is CARE OPD benefit?
faqs.answer: CARE OPD provides 4 general physician consultations and 4 specialist consultations per insured per year with maximum reimbursement of Rs.500 per consultation.

faqs.question: What specialists are covered under CARE OPD?
faqs.answer: Homeopathic physician, orthopedic surgeon, obstetrician and gynecologist, nephrologist, dietician, cardiologist, ENT specialist, pulmonologist, diabetologist, neurologist, psychiatrist, pediatrician, dermatologist, gastroenterologist.

faqs.question: How does co-payment work?
faqs.answer: Policy is eligible for premium discount in lieu of 20% co-payment on all claims. If both co-payment and smart select are opted, 20% co-payment applies on all claims plus additional 20% if treatment is outside smart select network.

faqs.question: What is Protect Plus Global Coverage?
faqs.answer: Protect Plus adds global coverage to the policy. Insured members are eligible for benefits based on sum insured and geography of coverage opted for treatments outside India.

faqs.question: Are NCB and Automatic Recharge available for out of India treatments?
faqs.answer: No, insured members are not eligible to claim amounts accrued under NCB/NCB Super and Recharge/Unlimited Automatic Recharge for treatments taken outside India.

faqs.question: What is Room Rent Modification?
faqs.answer: Room category will be modified to Most Economical Single PVT AC Room.

faqs.question: What is Pre & Post Modification?
faqs.answer: Pre-hospitalization expenses will be modified to 60 days and post-hospitalization expenses will be modified to 180 days.

faqs.question: What is the difference in out of India coverage for different sum insured amounts?
faqs.answer: For 25L/50L/100L: ailments/injuries must be diagnosed first in India, 30 days pre-hospitalization, 60 days post-hospitalization. For 200L/300L/600L: ailments/injuries can be diagnosed anywhere, 60 days pre-hospitalization, 120 days post-hospitalization.

faqs.question: Is compassionate visit covered?
faqs.answer: Compassionate visit is covered up to sum insured for out of India coverage with minimum hospitalization requirement of 5 days.

faqs.question: What is the coverage for advance technology methods?
faqs.answer: For sum insured 25L/50L/100L: up to 10% of sum insured. For sum insured 200L/300L/600L: up to sum insured.

faqs.question: How is lifetime score calculated for discount purposes?
faqs.answer: No claim: -1 score, claim up to INR 100,000: 0 score, claim INR 1,00,000 to 2,00,000: 1 score, claim INR 2,00,000 to 3,00,000: 2 score, claim more than 3,00,000: 3 score.
